name: Welsh Batch Scone
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Solid vegetable shortening, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Grease a large baking sheet and set aside.
2. Sift flour, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, mace, and coriander into a large bowl.
3. With your fingers, rub in the shortening until the mixture is crumbly.
4. Add sugar, raisins, and dates; mix well.
5. Turn out onto the baking sheet and pat with your hands to make an 8-inch round about 3/4 inch thick.
6. With a sharp knife, score the top into 8 wedges.
7. Brush with egg yolk and sprinkle with brown sugar.
8. Bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Transfer to a wire rack and cool for about 5 minutes before serving warm with butter.
